name: Green Valley Ranch Golf Academy
about: Green Valley Ranch Golf Academy is a comprehensive golf instruction facility that emphasizes the use of TrackMan technology for swing analysis and play. It offers a mix of on-course golf at their championship course and Par 3 course, as well as simulator training. The academy is part of a larger golf venue that includes tournament hosting, membership options, and various amenities like club fitting services. Pricing is accessible through online booking systems and offers various rates for on-course play and lessons, catering to a wide range of golfers from beginners to serious players.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium TrackMan technology for detailed swing analysis
Comprehensive golf instruction and coaching options
Both on-course play and simulator facilities available
Hosts tournaments and leagues for competitive play
On-site club fitting services for equipment optimization

food_and_drink.notes: On-site food service available at Green Valley Smokehouse
Bar service available at Green Valley Smokehouse

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade launch monitor with detailed ball and club tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but the facility also offers club rentals and has on-site club fitting services through Gott Golf Custom Club Fitting.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned as permitted, but the venue has on-site dining options at Green Valley Smokehouse.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The facility hosts a championship course and Par 3 course, with standard golf play times applying depending on tee time bookings and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly with programs like First Tee-Green Valley Ranch and offers junior/youth instruction and clinics.
